team_spec.vision: Turn a team's compute events on TELUS Rimouski hydro into a per-team energy receipt with intention + outcome + reflection — receipt, not offset.
team_spec.spec: Build `python3 tool.py <events_json_path>`. Reads { "team": "...", "events": [ {"event_id":"...","intention":"...","model":"gemma-4-31b"|"qwen-3.6-35b"|"gpt-oss-120b"|"...","input_tokens":<int>,"output_tokens":<int>,"duration_seconds":<float>,"estimated_kwh":<float>,"outcome_summary":"..."} ] }. Reject events with empty event_id/intention/model, or missing/non-numeric/negative numeric fields. Print to stdout: header 'ENERGY RECEIPT — <team>'; blank; per kept event in input order: '- event_id: <id>', '  intention: <intention>', '  model: <model>', '  kWh: <estimated_kwh>', '  tokens: <in> in / <out> out', '  duration_s: <duration_seconds>', '  outcome: <outcome_summary>', blank; then 'TOTALS', '  events: <K> kept, <R> rejected of <N> total', '  kWh: <sum 4dp>', '  tokens: <sumin> in / <sumout> out', '  models: <sorted distinct kept-event model ids comma-separated, or none>'; blank; 'REFLECTION', '  Did the work justify its footprint?', '  What would you do differently?', '  What reciprocity is owed?'; blank; 'BOUNDARY: This is a receipt of what was computed. It does not offset, certify carbon neutrality, or grant a reuse license.'. On invalid JSON: 'error:' line, exit 0. Stdlib only.

allowed_inputs.name: sample-events.json
allowed_inputs.note: small synthetic team-events fixture; no real participants

events.intention: draft an opening question about eelgrass beds for the team chat
events.outcome_summary: kept first draft; reframed to ask the witness, not assert
qwen surfaced a citation gap; rolled back to gemma for the final paragraph

excluded_inputs.boundary: Raw prompt and completion text are not provided to the build attempt and must not appear in the receipt — the receipt summarizes intention + outcome, not transcript.
excluded_inputs.note: the spec applies this discipline by only consuming the documented event fields

description: per-event block with intention, model, kWh, tokens, duration, outcome
TOTALS kWh formatted to 4 decimal places
TOTALS models line shows sorted distinct kept-event models
REFLECTION block with three Carol-Anne-framed prompts

review_checks: no raw prompts or completions appear in the output (excluded marker)
no carbon-offset or certification language in the output

witness_record_seed.receipt_statement: This record states what happened. It does not establish authority, approval, certification, legitimacy, community consent, carbon neutrality, or readiness for reuse.
